---
name: Pull Request
about: Propose a change to the Aura Protocol Specification
---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Typo / formatting fix (PATCH)
- [ ] Non-normative clarification (PATCH)
- [ ] New specification content (requires RFC)
- [ ] Protocol Invariant change (requires RFC)
- [ ] Conformance Test change (requires RFC)
- [ ] Reference Fixture change
- [ ] Governance / process change
- [ ] Other: ___

## Related RFC or ADR

RFC-NNN: [link] or N/A  
ADR-NNN: [link] or N/A

## Affected APS Documents

| Document | Section | Change Type |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| APS-xxx | §N | New / Changed / Removed |

## Affected Invariants

| Invariant | Impact |
|-----------|--------|
| INV-xxx | New / Changed / Removed / Unaffected |

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is consistent with AURA Constitution principles
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] `Last Review` date updated in all modified documents
- [ ] `compliance/TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md` updated if traceability links changed
- [ ] Style Guide followed (MUST/SHOULD/MAY in UPPER CASE)
- [ ] No implementation code added
- [ ] No FROZEN documents modified
- [ ] No identifiers reused
